name: Manuscript Submission State Diagram
input: Create a state diagram for a research manuscript lifecycle. States: Draft, Internal Review, Submitted, Under Review, Revisions Requested, Resubmitted, Accepted, In Production, Published, Rejected, Withdrawn. Transitions: Draft -> Internal Review (submit for co-author review). Internal Review -> Draft (revisions needed) or Internal Review -> Submitted (approved by all co-authors). Submitted -> Under Review (editor assigns reviewers). Under Review -> Revisions Requested (minor or major revisions) or Under Review -> Accepted (no revisions needed) or Under Review -> Rejected. Revisions Requested -> Resubmitted (author submits revised version). Resubmitted -> Under Review (re-review). Accepted -> In Production (copyediting and typesetting). In Production -> Published. Any state except Published can transition to Withdrawn.
qualityCriteria: Multiple outgoing transitions from Under Review (Revisions, Accepted, Rejected)
Resubmission loop visible (Revisions -> Resubmitted -> Under Review)
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Clean state diagram with rounded rectangles for states, labeled transitions, start/end markers, decision branching from Under Review, loop for revision cycle.
